_comment: Canonical wire format for bound operator context carried in X-VSO-Bound-Operators header from VSOD to VSE. This model ensures wire compatibility and enforces consistency across components.

bound_operator_context._description: Single bound operator entry in the X-VSO-Bound-Operators header array. VSOD resolves this from the database (BoundSessionsDocument + operator docs) and VSE parses it from the HTTP header.

operator_session_id.description: Operator session identifier for this binding

status.description: Operator status (e.g., 'bound', 'active', 'available'). Consumers should validate against their own enum values.
